title: cineraria helenitis
intro: Cineraria helenitis, also known as Nolana maliformis or 'Fan Flower', is a flowering plant species native to South America. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cineraria helenitis include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as tinctures and infusions, have been used to treat various ailments, including wounds, fever, and respiratory issues.
